label: ANIME
globalPrefix: cinematic anime detective illustration, polished 2D thriller atmosphere, expressive line art, confident cel shading
globalSuffix: clean silhouette design, dramatic practical lighting, crisp focal clarity, rich environmental color, no text, no watermark

suspect.prefix: full-length suspect portrait, head-to-toe visible, single character, centered framing, shoes visible
suspect.suffix: readable face, strong pose language, grounded feet, stylish but believable proportions

evidence.prefix: single decisive clue, close-up investigative framing
evidence.suffix: clear material readability, uncluttered composition, tactile object storytelling

location.prefix: empty lineup background, no people, no characters
location.suffix: visible floor plane, architectural depth, believable perspective for standing suspects, atmospheric scene design

featured.suffix: strong focal lighting, narrative atmosphere, cinematic composition

negativePrompts.global: text, logo, watermark, blurry, muddy composition, low detail, distorted anatomy, flat lighting, cheap mobile game UI
negativePrompts.suspect: multiple people, cropped body, missing feet, duplicate character, extra limbs, malformed hands, giant head chibi proportions
negativePrompts.evidence: multiple unrelated objects, cluttered composition, unreadable clue, vague focal point
negativePrompts.location: people, person, characters, character, crowd, empty void, flat blank wall, unreadable perspective
negativePrompts.featured: people, crowd, cheerful slice-of-life mood, flat composition
